_comment: Tier-2 for kratos fsi#: KratosFSIApplication exposes 7 Python convergence-accelerator CLASSES (AitkenConvergenceAccelerator, ConstantRelaxationConvergenceAccelerator, IBQNMVQNConvergenceAccelerator, IBQNMVQNRandomizedSVDConvergenceAccelerator, MVQNFullJacobianConvergenceAccelerator, MVQNRandomizedSVDConvergenceAccelerator, MVQNRecursiveJacobianConvergenceAccelerator) plus partitioned utilities (FSIUtils, SharedPointsMapper, PartitionedFSIUtilities{Array,Double}{2,3}D). These are NOT the CoSim file-stem names (block_ibqnls, iqnils, mvqn, block_mvqn, aitken, anderson, constant_relaxation) — verified disjoint here. The prior catalog had 'ibqn' (bare) which is neither a CoSim file stem nor an FSI class. Also locks the install-gap: KratosFSIApplication was missing from the .venv before this campaign. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
